calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar. Per the Sheriff, the hearing was cancelled because the opposition was received three days late. The Earnings Withholding Order has been modified as requested by the judgment debtor. (See Notice of Termination of Earnings Withholding Order filed on June 5, 2012). (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos. And Pos
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION WILL BE HEARD AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 ON LINE 13 OF THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Capital One Bank (U.S.A.), N.A.
No appearance by defendant Naun Molinero.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 26, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Capital One Bank (U.S.A.), N.A., and against defendant Naun Molinero as follows:

Principal - $1,092.36.
Interest - $259.94.
Attorney Fees - $325.00.
Costs - $267.50.

Total - $1,944.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Set For Trial On Apr-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
